description: This belt from Linos Perros sets the standard for all belts with its modern styling and vintage class. Wear this slim belt with casual or formal ensembles with matching shoes and bag. Length at the largest setting: 94 cm Made of textured leatherette for absolute durability, comfort and style Tang clasp with a fixed loop and holes to customise Fit Split along the centre linked with metal loops for style Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
